file_insights.purpose: Evaluation module for scoring and improving song generations

patterns_discovered.name: Retry with Progressive Escalation
patterns_discovered.description: Failed evaluations trigger stricter prompts on retry attempts
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves JSON output validity without wasting retries on identical prompts

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Exception Aggregation
patterns_discovered.description: Catches ValidationError, JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError, ValueError in single handler
patterns_discovered.benefit: Robust handling of various malformed response scenarios

patterns_discovered.name: Business Rule Validation Layer
patterns_discovered.benefit: Decouples validation logic from parsing; ensures 'bad' verdicts have improvements

patterns_discovered.name: Async/Await with Retries
patterns_discovered.description: Async LLM provider calls wrapped in retry loop
patterns_discovered.benefit: Non-blocking I/O with automatic recovery from transient failures

patterns_discovered.name: Structured Response Schema
patterns_discovered.description: Pydantic model validation via response_schema parameter
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe parsing and validation of LLM responses

gotchas_discovered.description: ValueError raised if verdict='bad' but improvements list is empty
gotchas_discovered.impact: Ensures evaluations with negative verdicts are actionable; could cause unexpected retries

gotchas_discovered.description: System and user prompts are re-assigned with stricter suffix on each failed attempt
gotchas_discovered.impact: Original prompts are not preserved; may accumulate strictness if _stricter_prompt is called multiple times

gotchas_discovered.description: last_error variable only retains the final exception after MAX_RETRIES exhausted
gotchas_discovered.impact: Earlier retry failures are logged but not surfaced in final exception message
Not configurable per preset or provider; may be insufficient for unstable providers

approach_details.implementation_strategy: Create robust evaluation module with retry and validation
key_decisions: Retry pattern with stricter prompts on failure
Multi-exception handling for JSON parsing and validation
Separate validation function for business rules
Logging at warning level for retries, error level for exhaustion
approach_details.test_coverage: Not visible in diff; validation logic is present but unit tests not shown
approach_details.production_readiness: High - proper error handling, logging, and validation in place

recommendations.suggestion: Make MAX_RETRIES configurable via Preset or environment variable
recommendations.rationale: Different models/providers may need different retry budgets

recommendations.suggestion: Preserve original prompt and apply incremental strictness (e.g., attempt 1: original, attempt 2: add JSON clarification, attempt 3: add schema details)
recommendations.rationale: Current approach may over-constrain prompts after first failure

recommendations.suggestion: Add metrics/telemetry on retry frequency per provider to identify problematic LLM models
recommendations.rationale: Would help optimize provider selection and identify when stricter prompts are needed

recommendations.suggestion: Add timeout parameter to provider.generate() call
recommendations.rationale: Prevents hanging on slow or stuck LLM endpoints

recommendations.suggestion: Include first attempt error in EvaluationError message, not just the last one
recommendations.rationale: Better debugging visibility into root cause of evaluation failures
